_doc: Pi-pinned snapshot of RPC mode surface at SHA 734e08e. Used by tests/pi_parity/test_phase_4_4_strict_superset.py.

jsonl_protocol.framing: LF (\n) only — U+2028/U+2029 NOT used as separators (they're valid inside JSON strings)
jsonl_protocol.incomplete_tail_on_end: if buffer non-empty at end-of-stream, emit as final line

rpc_mode_entry.stdout_takeover: takeOverStdout() to hijack stdout for JSONL
rpc_mode_entry.shutdown_sequence: shuttingDown flag → unsubscribe session → dispose runtime → pause stdin → exit(code)

rpc_client_entry.id_generation: Numeric counter or UUID per send

aelix_currently_supports._doc: Commands the existing aelix-agent-core AgentHarness can satisfy in Sprint 6d. Other commands return error response (success: false) per Pi shape.

deferred_to_future_sprints._doc: Pi commands that require additional Aelix infrastructure NOT yet built. Sprint 6d ships error-response stubs; future sprints wire them as the underlying surface lands.
deferred_to_future_sprints.steer / follow_up: Pi has separate steer+follow_up command paths; Aelix harness has single prompt + queue. Deferred to Sprint 6f (harness command paths).
deferred_to_future_sprints.set_model / cycle_model / get_available_: Aelix has no central ModelRegistry — Sprint 6e adds it alongside model discovery API.
deferred_to_future_sprints.abort_bash: Bash tool cancellation token (Sprint 6f hardening of Sprint 5b tool).
deferred_to_future_sprints.extension_ui_request / extension_ui_resp: Bidirectional UI bridge — Sprint 6f (TUI/Web UI work).

rpc_event_emission_contract._doc: Pi emits AgentSessionEvent objects via session.subscribe → output(event) without transformation. Aelix Phase 4 session events from harness.subscribe() will flow the same way.
